app_engine_integration_mode.description: Specifies the App Engine integration mode for the Firestore database; must be either "ENABLED" or "DISABLED".

cmek_config.description: Specifies the Customer Managed Encryption Key (CMEK) configuration for encrypting Firestore database data. Requires the full key resource name.

concurrency_mode.description: Defines the concurrency control mode for Firestore transactions, either 'OPTIMISTIC' or 'PESSIMISTIC'.

database_edition.description: Specifies the Firestore database edition, such as 'CLOUD_FIRESTORE' or 'DATASTORE_MODE', required for configuring the database type.

delete_protection_state.description: Indicates whether the Firestore database is protected from accidental deletion; must be set to "ENABLED" or "DISABLED".

deletion_policy.description: Specifies the policy for handling the database upon deletion, such as retaining or purging all data; must be set to "retain" or "delete".

location_id.description: Defines the geographic location where the Firestore database will be created. Must be a valid Google Cloud region.

name.description: Defines the unique identifier for the Firestore database. Must be globally unique and comply with naming conventions.

point_in_time_recovery_enablement.description: Enables point-in-time recovery for the Firestore database; must be supported in the selected region.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to organize and categorize the Firestore database resources, typically for identification or policy enforcement.

timeouts.description: Defines the time limits for create, update, and delete operations on the Firestore database.

type.description: Specifies the type of Firestore database to create, either 'FIRESTORE_NATIVE' or 'DATASTORE_MODE'.
